name: 1 to 1 humanoid edible toys
developer: 汉谟拉比炒面, 我的屁是香哒
short_description: A story about Ambiguous Affection, Appetite, and Tantalizing Desires.
detailed_description:
• Story Synopsis:

This game is an interactive text adventure, telling a story about blurred love, appetite, and desires to bite.
You'll play as the protagonist Mari Yano and interact with three virtual characters in a simulated romance, where different choices lead to different endings.

  • Character Introductions:

Protagonist:

Zui Liyang - Seems to believe there's little that sets them apart from others.

Romanceable Characters:

Chisa Wataru - As a friend, she's a Michelin-starred delicacy.

Mirin - A little bug. Swallowing him whole might go unnoticed.

Riai - Is he lying? Should I take a bite?


  • Game Overview:

Title: 1 to 1 humanoid edible toys
Genre: Female-oriented Romantic Crime Visual Novel
Number of Endings: 6

  • Creators:

汉谟拉比炒面, 我的屁是香哒

  • Follow Us:

Weibo: @汉谟拉比炒面, @我的屁是香哒
Afdian: @汉谟拉比炒面

Gameplay Streaming Guidelines:

Q: Can I share/stream gameplay footage of this game?
A: Yes, feel free to share without prior permission. However, please include the full game title and author ID in the description, and refrain from using clickbait titles containing unfriendly connotations like sexism.
